compiled_state.title: RED: Write test for Step 7.5 and commit pre-condition
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh with six subtests:
- test_step_7_5_exists: grep SKILL.md for "Step 7.5"
- test_batch_dispatch: grep for "batch.*5" or "batches of.*5"
- test_commit_between_batches: grep for "commit.*between.*batch" or "commit.*workflow.*batch"
- test_empty_scan_exit: grep for "zero.*candidate" or "empty.*scan.*result"
- test_commit_precondition: grep Step 8 area for "pre.condition" or "GREEN.*before.*commit"
- test_observation_tracking: grep for "observation" near "5.*session" or "dogfooding"

All must FAIL (RED) against current SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh
- [ ] Tests fail RED against current SKILL.md
  Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh

comments.body: Fixed: RED test file created, verified executable, syntax clean, all tests fail RED as expected
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
